title: Mika Kohno
text:
Hello! I’m an undergrad at Cal Poly SLO.
I write poems and occasionally post thoughts or small observations that don’t really fit anywhere.
This blog is a space for those fragments, ranging from writing, ideas, and whatever else inspires me over time.
Created April 17, 2026.

title: Poems
text: Pieces of writing from when I was inspired.

title: Lemongrass Honey
text:
I want to be known for who I am, And not boxed into who I could be. I don’t want to feel like a program; I want to be completely set free.
I want to be fully understood, For what I think and what I do. I want to be reassured, That they understand my point of view.
I want to be deeply cherished Like lemongrass and honey Will you say this before I am perished? Will I ever be somebody?
To be loved is to be known; And to be known is to be loved. Can you say that without hesitation? Or do you have to be shoved?
I want to be lemongrass honey: Sour with a kick of sweetness, Head empty, sometimes funny, Only then can I feel complete.
